_comment: Path patterns flagged by the post-commit advisor as requiring a daemon restart (NEED_HTTP_RESTART or NEED_STDIO_RESTART). Consumed by scripts/post-commit-restart-advisor.sh as the classification source-of-truth. Patterns are POSIX shell-glob style (case-sensitive). This repo is Go-only post-rust-retirement (T6) and post-frontend-split (chain auto-startup-dev-services T3) — the retired crates/** + inference-clients/** globs and the apps/dashboard arm were dropped with that residue (bug 985).
_doc: When editing: keep arms in sync with scripts/post-commit-restart-advisor.sh's classification arms; scripts/test-runtime-affecting-paths-parity.sh (run by the gate) pins that parity.
